response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 15+ years of diverse software experience, but critically undershoots the AI strategy and innovation requirements. While the resume shows solid technical leadership and recent entry into AI infrastructure work, it lacks the demonstrated AI/ML expertise, recognized products built with AI, and director-level strategic innovation impact required for this principal engineer role focused on AI differentiation.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse full-stack software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Strong technical mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
Proven ability to architect and deliver complex systems (real-time data processing, GIS platforms, micro-services at scale)
concerns: Minimal AI/ML expertise with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built—recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq (1.5 months) insufficient to establish required pattern
No advanced degree in AI-related field and no formal AI education or credentials matching preferred qualifications
Limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership or experience advising enterprise customers on technology adoption strategy
